details.reasoning: Excellent implementation that fully meets all rubric requirements. The ImageTextToTextPipeline class is properly created with an async _call method that accepts both images and text prompts. It correctly uses AutoModelForImageTextToText, processes pixel_values through the processor, tokenizes text inputs, and calls generate() to produce output with the proper generated_text format. The pipeline is correctly registered in SUPPORTED_TASKS with type 'multimodal' and the default model. JSDoc documentation is comprehensive with proper @typedef declarations. The implementation follows established patterns from similar pipelines (e.g., ImageToTextPipeline) and includes proper batching logic. No existing pipeline classes were modified. Minor deduction only for lack of explicit error handling, but this is consistent with other pipelines in the codebase.
